name: get_zone_schedule_blocks
description: Retrieve the scheduled temperature control blocks (time periods with specific setpoints) for a specific timetable in a zone. Returns the hourly or daily schedule blocks that define when and to what temperature a zone should be heated or cooled during normal operation.

timetable_id.description: The ID of the timetable to retrieve schedule blocks from

zone_id.description: The ID of the zone (room) to retrieve schedule blocks for
